creator: king@xs4all.nl
text:
Hi,

This port won't build anymore when PF integration is set. I think it's =
due to this:

Removed files:
net/miniupnpd/files pf_enable_filter_rules.patch

When building I get a error:

=3D=3D=3D>  Patching for miniupnpd-1.7,1
=3D=3D=3D>  Applying extra patch =
/usr/ports/net/miniupnpd/files/pf_enable_filter_rules.patch
cannot open /usr/ports/net/miniupnpd/files/pf_enable_filter_rules.patch: =
No such file or directory
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/net/miniupnpd.
*** Error code 1

Regards,

King=
